nodes.name: Greater yellow-headed vulture
nodes.summary: Greater yellow-headed vulture（Greater yellow-headed vulture，学名 Cathartes melambrotus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联13个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联857种鸟类，包括安第斯斑䳍、红头林䳍、灰䳍等857种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 蘇利南

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It was considered to be the same species as the lesser yellow-headed vulture until they were split in 1964. It is found in South America in tropical moist lowland forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The greater yellow-headed vulture is found in the Amazon Basin of tropical South America; specifically in south-eastern Colombia, southern and eastern Venezuela, Guyana, French Guiana, Suriname, northern and western Brazil, northern Bolivia, eastern Peru and eastern Ecuador

links.evidence: It is not found in the Andes, in the lowlands west or north of the Andes, in the relatively open regions of northern South America, eastern South America, or in the southern subtropical regions
